verse_text: All the days of his vow of purification no razor shall come upon his head; until the days are fulfilled for which he vowed to the Lord; he shall be holy. Then he shall let the locks of the hair of his head grow.

links.context: The vow Paul makes is likely a form of the Nazirite vow ([[NUM.6:1]]-21) given in thanksgiving for deliverance from danger.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Making a vow to the Lord can be as simple as promising Him to give a tithe of one's income, or as all-encompassing as monastic vows (see [[NUM.6:5]]; [[ACT.18:18]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
